# Atelier UI — Full API Reference

> Complete component API for LLM consumption. 25 accessible components for Angular, React, and Vue with consistent prop naming across all frameworks.
> Version 0.0.11 | https://atelier-ui.netlify.app

---

## Quick Start

### Install

  npm install @atelier-ui/angular   # Angular 21+
  npm install @atelier-ui/react     # React 18+
  npm install @atelier-ui/vue       # Vue 3+

### Design tokens (add to global styles)

  @import '@atelier-ui/angular/styles/tokens.css';
  @import '@atelier-ui/react/styles/tokens.css';
  @import '@atelier-ui/vue/styles/tokens.css';

### Framework-specific patterns

  Angular — signal inputs, two-way binding via [(value)], Signal Forms via [formField]
  React   — controlled props + callback (value + onValueChange), hooks for context
  Vue     — v-model:value, props + emits, provide/inject for compound components

---

## Component API

Each entry lists:
  Props: name | type | default | description
  Then framework-specific usage examples.

---

### LlmButton

  Import (Angular): import { LlmButton } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmButton } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmButton } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    variant   'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline'   'primary'   Visual style
    size      'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'                     'md'        Size
    disabled  boolean                                 false       Prevents interaction
    loading   boolean                                 false       Shows spinner, prevents interaction

  Angular:
    <llm-button variant="primary">Save</llm-button>
    <llm-button [loading]="isSaving" (click)="save()">Save</llm-button>
    <llm-button variant="outline" [disabled]="true">Disabled</llm-button>

  React:
    <LlmButton variant="primary" onClick={save}>Save</LlmButton>
    <LlmButton variant="secondary" loading={isSaving}>Saving...</LlmButton>
    <LlmButton variant="outline" disabled>Disabled</LlmButton>

  Vue:
    <LlmButton variant="primary" @click="save">Save</LlmButton>
    <LlmButton variant="secondary" :loading="isSaving">Saving...</LlmButton>

---

### LlmInput

  Import (Angular): import { LlmInput } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmInput } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmInput } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    value        string                                         ''       Controlled value
    type         'text' | 'email' | 'password' | 'number'      'text'   Input type
                 | 'tel' | 'url'
    placeholder  string                                         ''       Placeholder text
    disabled     boolean                                        false    Disables the input
    readonly     boolean                                        false    Read-only mode
    invalid      boolean                                        false    Error styling
    required     boolean                                        false    Required field
    name         string                                         ''       HTML name attribute

  Angular:
    <llm-input [(value)]="email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
    <llm-input [formField]="form.email" type="email" placeholder="Email" />
    <llm-input [invalid]="true" placeholder="Invalid" />

  React:
    <LlmInput value={email} onValueChange={setEmail} type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
    <LlmInput invalid placeholder="Error state" />

  Vue:
    <LlmInput v-model:value="email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
    <LlmInput :invalid="true" placeholder="Error state" />

---

### LlmTextarea

  Import (Angular): import { LlmTextarea } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmTextarea } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmTextarea } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    value       string    ''     Controlled value
    rows        number    3      Initial visible row count
    placeholder string    ''     Placeholder text
    disabled    boolean   false  Disables the textarea
    readonly    boolean   false  Read-only mode
    invalid     boolean   false  Error styling
    required    boolean   false  Required field
    name        string    ''     HTML name attribute
    autoResize  boolean   false  Grows height as content grows

  Angular:
    <llm-textarea [(value)]="bio" placeholder="About you..." [autoResize]="true" />

  React:
    <LlmTextarea value={bio} onValueChange={setBio} autoResize placeholder="About you..." />

  Vue:
    <LlmTextarea v-model:value="bio" :autoResize="true" placeholder="About you..." />

---

### LlmCheckbox

  Import (Angular): import { LlmCheckbox } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmCheckbox } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmCheckbox } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    checked        boolean              false   Controlled checked state
    indeterminate  boolean              false   Shows dash (partial selection)
    disabled       boolean              false   Disables the checkbox
    readonly       boolean              false   Read-only mode
    invalid        boolean              false   Error styling
    required       boolean              false   Required field
    name           string               ''      HTML name attribute

  Angular:
    <llm-checkbox [(checked)]="agreed">I agree to the terms</llm-checkbox>
    <llm-checkbox [indeterminate]="true">Select all</llm-checkbox>

  React:
    <LlmCheckbox checked={agreed} onCheckedChange={setAgreed}>I agree to the terms</LlmCheckbox>
    <LlmCheckbox indeterminate>Select all</LlmCheckbox>

  Vue:
    <LlmCheckbox v-model:checked="agreed">I agree to the terms</LlmCheckbox>

---

### LlmToggle

  Import (Angular): import { LlmToggle } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmToggle } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmToggle } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    checked   boolean   false   Controlled checked state
    disabled  boolean   false   Disables the toggle
    readonly  boolean   false   Read-only mode
    invalid   boolean   false   Error styling
    required  boolean   false   Required field
    name      string    ''      HTML name attribute

  Angular:
    <llm-toggle [(checked)]="notifications">Enable notifications</llm-toggle>

  React:
    <LlmToggle checked={notifications} onCheckedChange={setNotifications}>
      Enable notifications
    </LlmToggle>

  Vue:
    <LlmToggle v-model:checked="notifications">Enable notifications</LlmToggle>

---

### LlmRadioGroup + LlmRadio

  Import (Angular): import { LlmRadioGroup, LlmRadio } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmRadioGroup, LlmRadio } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmRadioGroup, LlmRadio } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmRadioGroup props:
    value     string    ''     Selected radio value
    disabled  boolean   false  Disables all radios
    readonly  boolean   false  Read-only mode
    invalid   boolean   false  Error styling
    required  boolean   false  Required field
    name      string    ''     HTML name (propagated to radios)

  LlmRadio props:
    radioValue  string   (required)   The value this radio represents
    disabled    boolean  false        Disables this specific radio

  Angular:
    <llm-radio-group [(value)]="plan">
      <llm-radio radioValue="free">Free</llm-radio>
      <llm-radio radioValue="pro">Pro</llm-radio>
      <llm-radio radioValue="enterprise">Enterprise</llm-radio>
    </llm-radio-group>

  React:
    <LlmRadioGroup value={plan} onValueChange={setPlan} name="plan">
      <LlmRadio radioValue="free">Free</LlmRadio>
      <LlmRadio radioValue="pro">Pro</LlmRadio>
      <LlmRadio radioValue="enterprise">Enterprise</LlmRadio>
    </LlmRadioGroup>

  Vue:
    <LlmRadioGroup v-model:value="plan" name="plan">
      <LlmRadio radioValue="free">Free</LlmRadio>
      <LlmRadio radioValue="pro">Pro</LlmRadio>
    </LlmRadioGroup>

---

### LlmSelect + LlmOption

  Import (Angular): import { LlmSelect, LlmOption } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmSelect, LlmOption } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmSelect, LlmOption } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmSelect props:
    value        string    ''     Selected option value
    placeholder  string    ''     Text shown when nothing is selected
    disabled     boolean   false  Disables the select
    readonly     boolean   false  Read-only mode
    invalid      boolean   false  Error styling
    required     boolean   false  Required field
    name         string    ''     HTML name attribute

  LlmOption props:
    optionValue  string   (required)   The value this option represents
    disabled     boolean  false        Makes this option unselectable

  Angular:
    <llm-select [(value)]="country" placeholder="Select a country">
      <llm-option optionValue="us">United States</llm-option>
      <llm-option optionValue="ca">Canada</llm-option>
      <llm-option optionValue="gb" [disabled]="true">United Kingdom</llm-option>
    </llm-select>

  React:
    <LlmSelect value={country} onValueChange={setCountry} placeholder="Select a country">
      <LlmOption optionValue="us">United States</LlmOption>
      <LlmOption optionValue="ca">Canada</LlmOption>
    </LlmSelect>

  Vue:
    <LlmSelect v-model:value="country" placeholder="Select a country">
      <LlmOption optionValue="us">United States</LlmOption>
      <LlmOption optionValue="ca">Canada</LlmOption>
    </LlmSelect>

  Notes:
    - Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, Escape closes, type-ahead filtering
    - ARIA: role="combobox" on trigger, role="listbox" on panel, role="option" on items

---

### LlmCombobox

  Import (Angular): import { LlmCombobox } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmCombobox } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmCombobox } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    value        string               ''   Selected option value
    options      LlmComboboxOption[]  []   Array of {value, label, disabled?}
    placeholder  string               ''   Input placeholder
    disabled     boolean              false  Disables the combobox
    invalid      boolean              false  Error styling

  LlmComboboxOption shape: { value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }

  Angular:
    <llm-combobox
      [(value)]="country"
      [options]="countries"
      placeholder="Search countries..."
    />

  React:
    const countries = [
      { value: 'us', label: 'United States' },
      { value: 'ca', label: 'Canada' },
      { value: 'gb', label: 'United Kingdom', disabled: true },
    ];
    <LlmCombobox value={country} onValueChange={setCountry} options={countries} placeholder="Search..." />

  Vue:
    <LlmCombobox v-model:value="country" :options="countries" placeholder="Search..." />

  Notes:
    - Typing filters options by case-insensitive substring match on label
    - Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up navigates list, Enter selects, Escape reverts
    - Difference from Select: data-driven options array vs. slotted children

---

### LlmBadge

  Import (Angular): import { LlmBadge } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmBadge } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmBadge } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    variant  'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'   'default'   Color scheme
    size     'sm' | 'md'                                               'md'        Size

  Angular:
    <llm-badge variant="success">Active</llm-badge>
    <llm-badge variant="danger" size="sm">Error</llm-badge>

  React:
    <LlmBadge variant="success">Active</LlmBadge>
    <LlmBadge variant="warning" size="sm">Pending</LlmBadge>

  Vue:
    <LlmBadge variant="info">New</LlmBadge>

---

### LlmCard + sub-components

  Import (Angular): import { LlmCard, LlmCardHeader, LlmCardContent, LlmCardFooter } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmCard, LlmCardHeader, LlmCardContent, LlmCardFooter } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmCard, LlmCardHeader, LlmCardContent, LlmCardFooter } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmCard props:
    variant  'elevated' | 'outlined' | 'flat'   'elevated'   Visual style
    padding  'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'        'md'         Inner spacing

  Angular:
    <llm-card variant="elevated" padding="md">
      <llm-card-header>Account Settings</llm-card-header>
      <llm-card-content>Update your profile information.</llm-card-content>
      <llm-card-footer>
        <llm-button variant="primary" size="sm">Save</llm-button>
      </llm-card-footer>
    </llm-card>

  React:
    <LlmCard variant="outlined" padding="lg">
      <LlmCardHeader>Account Settings</LlmCardHeader>
      <LlmCardContent>Update your profile information.</LlmCardContent>
      <LlmCardFooter>
        <LlmButton variant="primary" size="sm">Save</LlmButton>
      </LlmCardFooter>
    </LlmCard>

  Vue:
    <LlmCard variant="elevated">
      <LlmCardHeader>Account Settings</LlmCardHeader>
      <LlmCardContent>Update your profile information.</LlmCardContent>
    </LlmCard>

---

### LlmAvatar + LlmAvatarGroup

  Import (Angular): import { LlmAvatar, LlmAvatarGroup } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmAvatar, LlmAvatarGroup } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmAvatar, LlmAvatarGroup } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmAvatar props:
    src     string                                          ''        Image URL
    alt     string                                          ''        Alt text
    name    string                                          ''        Used for initials fallback
    size    'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'              'md'      Size
    shape   'circle' | 'square'                             'circle'  Shape
    status  'online' | 'offline' | 'away' | 'busy' | ''   ''        Status indicator dot

  LlmAvatarGroup props:
    max   number                    5    Max avatars before overflow count
    size  'xs' | 'sm' | 'md'...   'md'  Size applied to all avatars

  React:
    <LlmAvatar name="Jane Doe" size="lg" status="online" />
    <LlmAvatarGroup max={3}>
      <LlmAvatar name="Alice" />
      <LlmAvatar name="Bob" />
      <LlmAvatar name="Carol" />
      <LlmAvatar name="Dave" />
    </LlmAvatarGroup>

---

### LlmSkeleton

  Import (Angular): import { LlmSkeleton } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmSkeleton } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmSkeleton } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    variant   'text' | 'circular' | 'rectangular'   'text'    Shape
    width     string                                  '100%'   CSS width
    height    string                                  ''       CSS height (auto per variant if unset)
    animated  boolean                                 true     Shimmer animation

  React:
    <LlmSkeleton variant="circular" width="40px" />
    <LlmSkeleton variant="text" width="60%" />
    <LlmSkeleton variant="rectangular" height="200px" />

---

### LlmProgress

  Import (Angular): import { LlmProgress } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmProgress } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmProgress } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    value          number                                      0         Progress value (0–max)
    max            number                                      100       Maximum value
    indeterminate  boolean                                     false     Animated indeterminate state
    variant        'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'  'default'  Color
    size           'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'                         'md'      Bar height

  React:
    <LlmProgress value={75} variant="success" />
    <LlmProgress indeterminate />

---

### LlmBreadcrumbs + LlmBreadcrumbItem

  Import (Angular): import { LlmBreadcrumbs, LlmBreadcrumbItem } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmBreadcrumbs, LlmBreadcrumbItem } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmBreadcrumbs, LlmBreadcrumbItem } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmBreadcrumbs props:
    separator  string   '/'   Separator character between items

  LlmBreadcrumbItem props:
    href     string    ''      Link URL (omit for current page)
    current  boolean   false   Marks as current page (aria-current="page")

  React:
    <LlmBreadcrumbs>
      <LlmBreadcrumbItem href="/">Home</LlmBreadcrumbItem>
      <LlmBreadcrumbItem href="/settings">Settings</LlmBreadcrumbItem>
      <LlmBreadcrumbItem>Profile</LlmBreadcrumbItem>
    </LlmBreadcrumbs>

---

### LlmTabGroup + LlmTab

  Import (Angular): import { LlmTabGroup, LlmTab } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmTabGroup, LlmTab } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmTabGroup, LlmTab } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmTabGroup props:
    selectedIndex  number                    0           Active tab (0-based)
    variant        'default' | 'pills'       'default'   Tab strip style

  LlmTab props:
    label     string   (required)   Tab button text
    disabled  boolean  false        Disables this tab

  Angular:
    <llm-tab-group [(selectedIndex)]="activeTab" variant="pills">
      <llm-tab label="Account">Account settings content.</llm-tab>
      <llm-tab label="Billing">Billing information.</llm-tab>
      <llm-tab label="API" [disabled]="true">API access.</llm-tab>
    </llm-tab-group>

  React:
    <LlmTabGroup selectedIndex={tab} onSelectedIndexChange={setTab}>
      <LlmTab label="Account">Account settings content.</LlmTab>
      <LlmTab label="Billing">Billing information.</LlmTab>
    </LlmTabGroup>

  Vue:
    <LlmTabGroup v-model:selectedIndex="tab">
      <LlmTab label="Account">Account settings content.</LlmTab>
      <LlmTab label="Billing">Billing information.</LlmTab>
    </LlmTabGroup>

  Notes: Keyboard — Arrow keys move focus, Home/End jump to first/last, disabled tabs are skipped.

---

### LlmPagination

  Import (Angular): import { LlmPagination } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmPagination } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmPagination } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    page           number               1     Current page (1-indexed)
    pageCount      number               1     Total page count
    siblingCount   number               1     Page buttons either side of current
    showFirstLast  boolean              true  Show first/last jump buttons

  Angular:
    <llm-pagination [(page)]="currentPage" [pageCount]="totalPages" />

  React:
    <LlmPagination page={page} pageCount={totalPages} onPageChange={setPage} />

  Vue:
    <LlmPagination v-model:page="currentPage" :pageCount="totalPages" />

---

### LlmDialog + sub-components

  Import (Angular): import { LlmDialog, LlmDialogHeader, LlmDialogContent, LlmDialogFooter } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmDialog, LlmDialogHeader, LlmDialogContent, LlmDialogFooter } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmDialog, LlmDialogHeader, LlmDialogContent, LlmDialogFooter } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmDialog props:
    open             boolean                          false    Controls visibility
    size             'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'  'md'  Max-width
    closeOnBackdrop  boolean                          true     Close when clicking backdrop

  Angular:
    <llm-button (click)="open = true">Delete</llm-button>
    <llm-dialog [(open)]="open" size="sm">
      <llm-dialog-header>Confirm Delete</llm-dialog-header>
      <llm-dialog-content>This action cannot be undone.</llm-dialog-content>
      <llm-dialog-footer>
        <llm-button variant="outline" (click)="open = false">Cancel</llm-button>
        <llm-button variant="primary" (click)="confirm()">Delete</llm-button>
      </llm-dialog-footer>
    </llm-dialog>

  React:
    <LlmDialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} size="sm">
      <LlmDialogHeader>Confirm Delete</LlmDialogHeader>
      <LlmDialogContent>This action cannot be undone.</LlmDialogContent>
      <LlmDialogFooter>
        <LlmButton variant="outline" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</LlmButton>
        <LlmButton variant="primary" onClick={handleDelete}>Delete</LlmButton>
      </LlmDialogFooter>
    </LlmDialog>

  Notes: Focus is trapped inside while open. Escape closes. Uses native <dialog> element.

---

### LlmDrawer + sub-components

  Import (Angular): import { LlmDrawer, LlmDrawerHeader, LlmDrawerContent, LlmDrawerFooter } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmDrawer, LlmDrawerHeader, LlmDrawerContent, LlmDrawerFooter } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmDrawer, LlmDrawerHeader, LlmDrawerContent, LlmDrawerFooter } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmDrawer props:
    open             boolean                            false    Controls visibility
    position         'left' | 'right' | 'top' | 'bottom'  'right'  Slide-in edge
    size             'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'full'       'md'     Width (or height for top/bottom)
    closeOnBackdrop  boolean                            true     Close on backdrop click

  React:
    <LlmDrawer open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} position="right" size="md">
      <LlmDrawerHeader>Filters</LlmDrawerHeader>
      <LlmDrawerContent>
        <LlmInput placeholder="Search..." />
      </LlmDrawerContent>
      <LlmDrawerFooter>
        <LlmButton onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Apply</LlmButton>
      </LlmDrawerFooter>
    </LlmDrawer>

---

### LlmTooltip

  Import (Angular): import { LlmTooltip } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmTooltip } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmTooltip } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    tooltip          string                              (required)   Tooltip text
    position         'above' | 'below' | 'left' | 'right'  'above'  Preferred position
    disabled         boolean                             false        Suppress tooltip
    showDelay        number                              300          ms before showing
    hideDelay        number                              0            ms before hiding

  Angular (directive):
    <llm-button llmTooltip="Save your changes">Save</llm-button>
    <llm-button [llmTooltip]="tip" llmTooltipPosition="right">Copy</llm-button>

  React (wrapper):
    <LlmTooltip tooltip="Save your changes">
      <LlmButton>Save</LlmButton>
    </LlmTooltip>

  Vue (wrapper):
    <LlmTooltip tooltip="Save your changes" position="right">
      <LlmButton>Save</LlmButton>
    </LlmTooltip>

---

### LlmToast

  Import (Angular): import { LlmToastContainer, LlmToastService } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmToastProvider, LlmToastContainer, useLlmToast } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmToastContainer, useLlmToast } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Show options: { variant?, duration?, dismissible? }
    variant     'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'   'default'
    duration    number   5000   Auto-dismiss ms. 0 = no auto-dismiss
    dismissible boolean  true   Show dismiss button

  LlmToastContainer prop:
    position  'top-right' | 'top-center' | 'bottom-right' | 'bottom-center'   'bottom-right'

  Angular (service-based):
    // app.component.html — place once:
    <llm-toast-container position="bottom-right" />

    // any component:
    constructor(private toast: LlmToastService) {}
    this.toast.show('Saved!', { variant: 'success' });
    this.toast.show('Error', { variant: 'danger', duration: 0 });

  React (hook-based):
    // app root:
    <LlmToastProvider>
      <App />
      <LlmToastContainer position="bottom-right" />
    </LlmToastProvider>

    // any component:
    const { show } = useLlmToast();
    show('Saved!', { variant: 'success' });
    show('Error occurred', { variant: 'danger', duration: 8000 });

  Vue (hook-based):
    // app root:
    <LlmToastContainer position="bottom-right" />

    // any component:
    const { show } = useLlmToast();
    show('Saved!', { variant: 'success' });

---

### LlmMenu + sub-components

  Import (Angular): import { LlmMenu, LlmMenuItem, LlmMenuTrigger, LlmMenuSeparator } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmMenu, LlmMenuItem, LlmMenuTrigger, LlmMenuSeparator } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmMenu, LlmMenuItem, LlmMenuTrigger, LlmMenuSeparator } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmMenu props:
    variant  'default' | 'compact'   'default'   Menu density

  LlmMenuItem props:
    disabled  boolean   false   Disables this menu item

  Angular:
    <llm-button [llmMenuTriggerFor]="myMenu">Actions</llm-button>
    <llm-menu #myMenu>
      <llm-menu-item (triggered)="copy()">Copy</llm-menu-item>
      <llm-menu-item (triggered)="paste()">Paste</llm-menu-item>
      <llm-menu-separator />
      <llm-menu-item [disabled]="true">Delete</llm-menu-item>
    </llm-menu>

  React:
    <LlmMenuTrigger menu={<LlmMenu>
      <LlmMenuItem onTriggered={copy}>Copy</LlmMenuItem>
      <LlmMenuItem onTriggered={paste}>Paste</LlmMenuItem>
    </LlmMenu>}>
      <LlmButton>Actions</LlmButton>
    </LlmMenuTrigger>

  Notes: Full keyboard nav. Supports nested submenus by nesting LlmMenu inside LlmMenuItem.

---

### LlmAccordionGroup + LlmAccordionItem

  Import (Angular): import { LlmAccordionGroup, LlmAccordionItem } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmAccordionGroup, LlmAccordionItem } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmAccordionGroup, LlmAccordionItem } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmAccordionGroup props:
    multi     boolean                                false       Allow multiple open at once
    variant   'default' | 'bordered' | 'separated'  'default'   Visual style

  LlmAccordionItem props:
    expanded  boolean   false   Initially expanded
    disabled  boolean   false   Prevents toggling

  Angular:
    <llm-accordion-group variant="separated" [multi]="true">
      <llm-accordion-item>
        <span llmAccordionHeader>What is Atelier UI?</span>
        A component library optimized for LLM-assisted development.
      </llm-accordion-item>
      <llm-accordion-item [expanded]="true">
        <span llmAccordionHeader>How do I install it?</span>
        Run npm install @atelier-ui/angular.
      </llm-accordion-item>
    </llm-accordion-group>

  React:
    <LlmAccordionGroup variant="bordered">
      <LlmAccordionItem header="What is Atelier UI?">
        A component library optimized for LLM-assisted development.
      </LlmAccordionItem>
    </LlmAccordionGroup>

  Vue:
    <LlmAccordionGroup :multi="true" variant="separated">
      <LlmAccordionItem>
        <template #header>What is Atelier UI?</template>
        A component library optimized for LLM-assisted development.
      </LlmAccordionItem>
    </LlmAccordionGroup>

---

### LlmAlert

  Import (Angular): import { LlmAlert } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmAlert } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmAlert } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    variant      'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'   'info'   Color and icon
    dismissible  boolean                                       false    Show close button

  Angular:
    <llm-alert variant="success">Changes saved successfully.</llm-alert>
    <llm-alert variant="warning" [dismissible]="true" (dismissed)="hide()">
      Session expires in 5 minutes.
    </llm-alert>

  React:
    <LlmAlert variant="danger">Something went wrong.</LlmAlert>
    <LlmAlert variant="warning" dismissible onDismissed={() => setVisible(false)}>
      Session expires soon.
    </LlmAlert>

  Vue:
    <LlmAlert variant="info" :dismissible="true" @dismissed="visible = false">
      Your account is pending verification.
    </LlmAlert>

---

### LlmStepper + LlmStep

  Import (Angular): import { LlmStepper, LlmStep } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmStepper, LlmStep, useLlmStepper } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmStepper, LlmStep } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  LlmStepper props:
    activeStep    number                         0            Active step index (0-based)
    orientation   'horizontal' | 'vertical'      'horizontal' Layout direction
    linear        boolean                         false        Require prior steps complete to advance

  LlmStep props:
    label        string   (required)   Step button text
    description  string   ''           Subtitle below label
    completed    boolean  false        Shows checkmark icon
    error        boolean  false        Shows error icon
    optional     boolean  false        Shows "Optional" label
    disabled     boolean  false        Prevents navigation to this step

  Angular:
    <llm-stepper [(activeStep)]="step" orientation="horizontal">
      <llm-step label="Account" description="Basic info" [completed]="step > 0">
        <p>Fill in your account details.</p>
        <llm-button (click)="step = step + 1">Next</llm-button>
      </llm-step>
      <llm-step label="Profile">
        <p>Set up your profile.</p>
        <llm-button (click)="step = step - 1">Back</llm-button>
        <llm-button (click)="step = step + 1">Next</llm-button>
      </llm-step>
      <llm-step label="Review">
        <p>Review and submit.</p>
        <llm-button variant="primary">Submit</llm-button>
      </llm-step>
    </llm-stepper>

  React:
    // useLlmStepper() hook available inside step content
    function StepContent() {
      const { next, prev } = useLlmStepper();
      return <LlmButton onClick={next}>Next</LlmButton>;
    }

    <LlmStepper activeStep={step} onActiveStepChange={setStep}>
      <LlmStep label="Account" completed={step > 0}>
        <StepContent />
      </LlmStep>
      <LlmStep label="Profile">Content</LlmStep>
      <LlmStep label="Review">Content</LlmStep>
    </LlmStepper>

  Vue:
    <LlmStepper v-model:activeStep="step" orientation="horizontal">
      <LlmStep label="Account" :completed="step > 0">
        <LlmButton @click="step++">Next</LlmButton>
      </LlmStep>
      <LlmStep label="Profile">
        <LlmButton @click="step--">Back</LlmButton>
        <LlmButton @click="step++">Next</LlmButton>
      </LlmStep>
    </LlmStepper>

---

### LlmCodeBlock

  Import (Angular): import { LlmCodeBlock } from '@atelier-ui/angular'
  Import (React):   import { LlmCodeBlock } from '@atelier-ui/react'
  Import (Vue):     import { LlmCodeBlock } from '@atelier-ui/vue'

  Props:
    code            string    ''       The code string to display (required)
    language        string    'text'   Language label shown in the header. Ignored if filename is set.
    filename        string    ''       Optional filename shown in header instead of language label
    copyable        boolean   true     Whether to show a copy-to-clipboard button
    showLineNumbers boolean   false    Whether to display line numbers alongside the code

  Angular:
    <llm-code-block code="const x = 1;" language="typescript" />
    <llm-code-block [code]="generatedCode" filename="app.component.ts" [showLineNumbers]="true" />
    <llm-code-block [code]="shellCmd" language="shell" [copyable]="false" />

  React:
    <LlmCodeBlock code="const x = 1;" language="typescript" />
    <LlmCodeBlock code={generatedCode} filename="app.tsx" showLineNumbers />
    <LlmCodeBlock code={shellCmd} language="shell" copyable={false} />

    // Common usage: rendering LLM-generated code output
    const [generatedCode, setGeneratedCode] = useState('');
    <LlmCodeBlock code={generatedCode} language="typescript" filename="result.ts" showLineNumbers />

  Vue:
    <LlmCodeBlock code="const x = 1;" language="typescript" />
    <LlmCodeBlock :code="generatedCode" filename="app.vue" :showLineNumbers="true" />
    <LlmCodeBlock :code="shellCmd" language="shell" :copyable="false" />

---

## Design Token System

All components use CSS custom properties. Override at :root or on any ancestor element.

  --ui-font-family          Font stack
  --ui-font-size-xs/sm/md/lg/xl  Type scale
  --ui-font-weight-normal/medium/semibold/bold  Weight scale

  --ui-spacing-1 through --ui-spacing-12  Spacing scale (0.25rem steps)

  --ui-radius-sm/md/lg/full  Border radii
  --ui-shadow-sm/md/lg       Box shadows

  --ui-color-primary         Brand color
  --ui-color-primary-light   Tinted brand (for selected states)
  --ui-color-text            Primary text
  --ui-color-text-muted      Secondary text
  --ui-color-background      Page background
  --ui-color-surface-raised  Card/panel background (elevated above page)
  --ui-color-surface-sunken  Hover/input background (recessed)
  --ui-color-border          Default borders
  --ui-color-input-bg        Input field background
  --ui-color-input-border    Input border
  --ui-color-input-border-focus  Focused input border
  --ui-color-input-border-invalid  Error state border
  --ui-color-placeholder     Placeholder text color
  --ui-color-error-text      Error message text

  --ui-focus-ring            Full focus ring box-shadow value

  --ui-z-dropdown            z-index for dropdowns/panels
  --ui-z-modal               z-index for dialogs/drawers

Dark mode: all tokens shift automatically via prefers-color-scheme, or set data-theme="dark" on <html>.

Custom theme example:
  :root {
    --ui-color-primary: #10b981;
    --ui-color-primary-light: #d1fae5;
    --ui-radius-md: 2px; /* sharp corners */
  }

---

## Accessibility Notes

- All interactive components have appropriate ARIA roles, states, and properties
- Keyboard navigation follows WAI-ARIA patterns (arrow keys for composite widgets)
- Focus is managed programmatically for dialogs (trap), select/combobox (active descendant), tabs (roving tabindex)
- Color is never the sole indicator of state — icons and text labels accompany color changes
- All form controls support invalid, disabled, required, and readonly states with proper aria- attributes
